comment: Bahut accha kaam kiya, pipe leakage bilkul theek ho gayi. Time par aaye aur kaam bhi clean kiya.
Painting ka kaam ache se kiya. Slight color mismatch tha but overall satisfactory.
Very professional. Switchboard upgrade bahut accha kiya. Price bhi reasonable tha.
Furniture assembly perfect kiya. Almirah ki fitting bhi top class.
Terrace waterproofing kiya, ab leakage nahi hai. Good work done.
Deep cleaning excellent, ghar chamak gaya. Staff was polite and punctual.
Bathroom tiles perfect fit kiye. Grouting bhi very neat. Highly recommend.
Wall putty kiya, surface smooth ho gayi. Painting ke liye ready hai ab.
Ek hi call par sab aa gaye. Plumbing aur electrical dono ka kaam ek din mein done.
Drainage ka kaam kiya. Bucket full paani nahi rhta ab. Thoda expensive tha.
Texture painting superb! Drawing room wall looks premium now.
New wiring for entire house. Safety certificate bhi diya. Bahut reliable.
Modular kitchen ki design aur fitting flawless hai. Artisan skill excellent.
Bathroom waterproofing kiya. Ab paani niklta nahi. Warranty document diya.
Full home deep cleaning ki. Kitchen aur bathroom especially clean kiye.
Floor tiles level perfect hai. Cutting work bhi precise. Very hardworking team.
Putty toh kiya but surface preparation could be better. Time par finish kiya.
Complete home repair ek hi day mein. Plumber, electrician, painter sab the. Amazing service.
Bathroom pipe replacement kiya. Old pipes nikal ke new lagayi. Professional approach.
Waterproof coat on exterior walls. Ab monsoon mein bhi ghar dry hai. Great job.
Old wiring complete replace ki. MCB box bhi upgrade kiya. Very thorough work.
Antique wood restoration amazing. Oldalmirah ki polish like new. Master craftsmanship.
Quarterly maintenance contract banaya hai. Monthly aate hain, sab first class.
Marble flooring kiya. Italian finish exact match. Slight delay tha but quality top.
Water tank cleaning aur pipe repair. Jab se karwaya hai, paani ka flow better hai.
Kitchen walls painting kiya. Oil bond applied. Smell bhi kam Hui. Achha kaam.
Complete house rewiring. Modern switches aur sockets. Earthing bhi proper kiya.
Geyser installation aur bathroom fitting. Clean finish mila. Price theek tha.
Roof heat reflective paint amazing hai. Room temperature 3-4 degree cool. Worth it.
On time aaye, kaam bhi fast kiya. Fitting brand new quality se kiya.
Emergency call liya, 30 minute mein aa gaye. Temporary fix kiya aur next day permanent.
Kids room painting with cartoon theme. Bahut cute ban gaya. Kids love it.
TV unit aur shoe rack fixed. Dismantling aur reassembly dono handled. Professional.
Boundary wall paint kiya. Weather guard quality. Colour vibrant hai. Good finish.
